title: Database replication lag on audit-db — 265s behind primary
body: Replication lag alert at 14:05 UTC. The audit-db read replica is 265 seconds behind the primary (normal: <4s). Read traffic routed to the replica is receiving stale data. Affected read paths: /v2/inventory, /v2/products. Primary write load has increased 96% in the last hour — suspected cause is a large batch job or unoptimised bulk update creating excessive WAL volume. If lag exceeds 600s the read replica will be taken offline automatically, routing all traffic to the primary — this will increase primary load significantly. Customers on the reporting dashboard (Soylent Corp, Bluth Company) are seeing data that is 265 seconds old.
